name: Head Injury Claims After Ladder Falls

mainEntity.name: Can I claim head injury from ladder fall in South Salt Lake?
mainEntity.text: Can I claim head injury from ladder fall in South Salt Lake?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, concussions/TBI covered; requires neurologist eval, cognitive testing. PTSD secondary claims viable with psych IME.

suggestedAnswer.text: South Salt Lake falls often cause MTBI—use GCS scores, CT scans. Wage loss from cognitive deficits supports extended TTD. Insurers challenge psych claims; build strong nexus.

description: Yes, concussions/TBI covered; requires neurologist eval, cognitive testing. PTSD secondary claims viable with psych IME.
